description_long: This object consists of five pieces of toasted sandwich bread, some with visible toppings and fillings. Three of the pieces are square slices of toast, two of which have a pat of butter or cheese on top, while the third is plain. One piece is a triangular sandwich, cut diagonally, revealing a layered filling between two slices of bread. Another piece is a stacked sandwich, showing a thick filling between two slices of toasted bread. The bread surfaces are lightly browned, with a realistic toasted texture and some variation in color. The fillings appear to be a pale yellow, possibly cheese or butter, and the bread edges are slightly rounded. The overall appearance suggests a simple, classic sandwich selection, suitable for a casual meal or snack.
description: A set of toasted sandwich slices, some with visible butter or cheese, including a stacked and a triangular sandwich. The bread is lightly browned with realistic toasted textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five sandwich pieces, with two square slices topped with butter or cheese, a plain slice, a stacked sandwich, and a triangular sandwich.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the stacked and triangular sandwiches, and the toppings on the square slices.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain sides of the bread and the layered fillings in the stacked and triangular sandwiches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the cut edge of the triangular sandwich and the plain slice at the back.
